$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for typography tokens. LOCKED per FRONTEND_DESIGN_PLAN.md Section 2.2. Two families only (serif display + humanist sans body/UI); UI/meta is the body sans at smaller size, NOT a third family.

display.$comment: Section 2.2: literary serif with Bengali support + Latin literary serif fallback. Self-hosted via app/fonts.css (@font-face, swap). The '… Fallback' family is a metric-adjusted face (app/fonts.css) placed first in fallback[] so font swap causes no CLS (Section 1.3) — the next/font technique done in CSS.

body.$comment: Section 2.2: humanist sans with strong Bengali hinting + Inter for Latin. Workhorse face for body + UI + meta. '… Fallback' is the CLS-safe metric-adjusted fallback (app/fonts.css).

text-display.use: Article H1 / post title on its own page

text-card-title.use: Post title inside an index card

text-h2.use: In-article section headings (১) প্রেম রাজনীতি pattern)

text-body.use: Article paragraphs — generous line-height for Bengali
